final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat Official Account article cover image for a fragrance product launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Aesop brand visual heritage, Kinfolk magazine editorial photography, 2010s minimalist luxury skincare campaigns; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the headline as the dominant focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product context as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumnal, refined atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm autumn direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (main headline, prominent), "秋意染染 时光留香" (subheadline)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio; headline must be the dominant visual element
Avoid:
